8. **Ethical Considerations**: Students will be aware of the ethical implications of machine learning and AI, including bias, fairness, and privacy concerns.

9. **Collaboration and Communication**: Students will develop skills to work collaboratively in teams and effectively communicate their findings and methodologies.
